incorrect_examples.target_event: South Korea’s parliament voted to impeach President Yoon Suk Yeol.
Capitol Police Chief Steven Sund, House Sergeant at Arms Paul Irving, and Senate Sergeant at Arms Michael Stenger resigned.
Police, parliament, prosecutors, and the anti-corruption body launched separate investigations into Yoon on treason allegations.
Elon Musk gained full command of the federal cost-cutting effort.
Musk allies took top positions in federal agencies.
Mr. Musk stated DOGE participants will not be paid and requested they work 80-hour weeks.
Lockdowns obstructed agricultural flow, resulting in hiked food prices, food shortages, malnutrition, and deaths.
The FBI and ATF cleared the Capitol.
The British pound plunged in value.
Northern Ireland and Scotland voted to remain in the EU.

Authorities in Myanmar and Thailand declared a state of emergency.

correct_examples.target_event: Videos of the assassination circulated on social media.
